ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "testing_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing area where the instrument is used */,
  "max_throughput" INTEGER /* Maximum throughput of the instrument */,
  "per_test_control" INTEGER /* Number of control tests per test */,
  "daily_control_test" INTEGER /* Number of daily control tests */,
  "weekly_control_test" INTEGER /* Number of weekly control tests */,
  "monthly_control_test" INTEGER /* Number of monthly control tests */,
  "quarterly_control_test" INTEGER /* Number of quarterly control tests */,
  "instrument_model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "instrument_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "instrument_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "instrument_category" TEXT /* Category of the instrument (e.g., molecular, POC) */,
  "calibration_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of calibration (in days) */,
  "maintenance_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of maintenance (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_testing_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("testing_area_id") REFERENCES testing_areas ("testing_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_areas" (
  "testing_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing area */,
  "testing_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the testing area */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor responsible for the testing area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_tests" (
  "control_test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control test */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument on which the test was performed */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the control test was performed */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of control test (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the control test */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the control test (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the control test */,
  "passed_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for passing the control test */,
  "failed_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for failing the control test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_tests_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test schedule */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument for which the test is scheduled */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the control test is scheduled */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of control test (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test schedule (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Whether a notification has been sent for the scheduled test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_schedules_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument on which the test was performed */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., molecular, POC, surveillance) */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample tested */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the test */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the test */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the test result (e.g., pending, validated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_type FOREIGN KEY ("test_type") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., blood, tissue) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient from whom the sample was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sample */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "test_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the test type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., calibration, repair) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the maintenance */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_maintenance_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_calibrations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_repair_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repair request */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument requiring repair */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the repair request was submitted */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the repair request (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* ID of the technician assigned to the repair */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the repair request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_repair_requests_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the technician (e.g., molecular, POC) */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_kits" (
  "kit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test kit */,
  "kit_name" TEXT /* Name of the test kit */,
  "kit_type" TEXT /* Type of the test kit */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the test kit */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the test kit */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the test kit in stock */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the test kit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kit_usages" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kit usage record */,
  "kit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test kit used */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument on which the kit was used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the kit was used */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the kit used */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who used the kit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kit_usages_kit_id FOREIGN KEY ("kit_id") REFERENCES test_kits ("kit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kit_usages_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reagents" (
  "reagent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reagent */,
  "reagent_name" TEXT /* Name of the reagent */,
  "reagent_type" TEXT /* Type of the reagent */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the reagent */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the reagent */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reagent in stock */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the reagent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reagent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reagent_usages" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reagent usage record */,
  "reagent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reagent used */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument on which the reagent was used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the reagent was used */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reagent used */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who used the reagent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reagent_usages_reagent_id FOREIGN KEY ("reagent_id") REFERENCES reagents ("reagent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reagent_usages_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the metric */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the metric */,
  "acceptable_range" TEXT /* Acceptable range for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_test_metrics" (
  "control_test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control test */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality control metric */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result value for the metric */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the metric (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_test_id", "metric_id")
)
